response.justification: Szabo has 19 years of technical experience exceeding the 15-year requirement and current AI infrastructure expertise at Google, plus demonstrated builder mentality through open-source platforms. However, the role explicitly demands strategic leadership and customer advisory expertise—responsibilities largely absent from this hands-on engineer's resume. He's a strong technical foundation candidate but appears better suited for Principal Engineer roles emphasizing execution over strategy.
strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, infrastructure) with proven ability to scale systems handling millions of requests/second
Current Staff Engineer role at Google contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing active engagement with cutting-edge AI tooling
Strong builder mentality and technical communication: shipped multiple open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and delivered technical workshops at major conferences (FOSS4G 2019)
concerns: Limited evidence of strategic AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms—current role involves infrastructure, not strategy or customer-facing AI advisory
No director-level strategic leadership shown: resume highlights technical contribution and mentoring, not organizational strategy-setting or steering difficult endeavors across teams
Missing preferred Master's or PhD in AI; lacks demonstrated customer/partner advisory experience required to 'advise strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption'

key_factors.factor: AI Strategy vs. AI Infrastructure Focus
